title: Trischidium molle
taxonomy: Trischidium molle is classified as a species within the genus Trischidium and the family Polygalaceae. This classification places it within the order Polygalales, a group of flowering plants commonly known as the milkwort family. The family Polygalaceae is part of the larger clade Rosidae, which includes a diverse range of flowering plant families. Within the Polygalaceae family, Trischidium molle is one of several species, each with distinct characteristics and growth habits. This classification helps to identify and differentiate Trischidium molle from other related plant species.
uses: Trischidium molle is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
